message:
fix(core): harden error handling, fix UTF-8 truncation, escape parsing, OOM protection

Targeted bug fixes and robustness improvements across 15 files:

Error detection (agent/parser.go, parser_test.go):
- detectError default case now checks ALL error patterns instead of
  returning false for unknown agent types (Ollama now detects errors)

Concurrency (bv/bv.go):
- Replace atomic.Value wrapping *sync.Map with plain sync.Map
  (sync.Map is already concurrent-safe; wrapper added indirection)

OOM protection (caut/client.go):
- Add limitedBuffer capping stdout capture at 10MB

Error handling (checkpoint/capture.go, cli/git.go, cli/logs.go):
- capture.go: check SaveGitStatus error (was silently discarded)
- git.go: check dry-run git fetch error
- logs.go: discard json.Encode error (satisfies errcheck linter)

UTF-8 safety (ensemble/dedupe.go):
- truncateDedupText iterates by rune not byte, handles edge cases
  (maxLen <= 0, maxLen <= 3) to prevent mid-rune truncation

Event bus (events/bus.go):
- Ring buffer History() breaks early on nil values (ring not full)

Health checks (health/health.go):
- Move semaphore release into defer to ensure token release on panic

Escape parsing (pipeline/conditions.go):
- Fix findLogicalOp and ValidateCondition: replace broken look-behind
  (expr[i-1]=='\\') with proper escaped state variable for \\\" case

Robot (robot/events.go, spawn.go, synthesis.go):
- events.go: remove redundant int64 type annotation
- spawn.go: add Codex prompt regex for hint text ((?m)^>)
- synthesis.go: add strconv.Unquote for git status paths with spaces

Tools (tools/cass.go): trailing whitespace fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -349,7 +349,13 @@ func (p *parserImpl) detectError(output string, agentType AgentType) bool {
 	case AgentTypeAider:
 		return matchAny(recentOutput, aiderErrorPatterns)
 	default:
-		return false // Unknown type - don't assume error
+		// Check all patterns for unknown type
+		return matchAny(recentOutput, ccErrorPatterns) ||
+			matchAny(recentOutput, codErrorPatterns) ||
+			matchAny(recentOutput, gmiErrorPatterns) ||
+			matchAny(recentOutput, cursorErrorPatterns) ||
+			matchAny(recentOutput, windsurfErrorPatterns) ||
+			matchAny(recentOutput, aiderErrorPatterns)
 	}
 }

@@ -138,8 +138,11 @@ func CheckSession(ctx context.Context, session string) (*SessionHealth, error) {
 			case <-ctx.Done():
 				return
 			}
+			
+			// Ensure token is released even if checkAgent panics
+			defer func() { <-sem }()
+			
 			agentHealth := checkAgent(ctx, pa)
-			<-sem // Release token
 
 			mu.Lock()
 			defer mu.Unlock()

@@ -20,7 +20,8 @@ var promptPatterns = []*regexp.Regexp{
 	regexp.MustCompile(`(?m)^\$\s*$`), // Empty Shell prompt
 	regexp.MustCompile(`(?m)^%\s*$`),  // Empty Zsh prompt
 	regexp.MustCompile(`❯\s*$`),       // Modern prompts (U+276F)
-	regexp.MustCompile(`›\s*$`),       // Codex prompt (U+203A)
+	regexp.MustCompile(`›\s*$`),       // Codex prompt (U+203A) empty
+	regexp.MustCompile(`(?m)^›`),      // Codex prompt with hint text
 	regexp.MustCompile(`>\s*$`),       // Simple prompt at end of output
 	regexp.MustCompile(`(?m)^>\s*$`),  // Simple prompt on its own line
 }

@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ import (
 	"path"
 	"path/filepath"
 	"regexp"
+	"strconv"
 	"strings"
 	"sync"
 	"time"
@@ -225,6 +226,15 @@ func parseGitStatusPorcelain(output, repoPath string) ([]GitFileStatus, error) {
 			path = path[idx+4:]
 		}
 
+		// Unquote if necessary (git quotes paths with spaces or special chars)
+		if len(path) >= 2 && path[0] == '"' && path[len(path)-1] == '"' {
+			// A simple unquote; for full C-style escape sequence unquoting,
+			// strconv.Unquote is usually correct here.
+			if unquoted, err := strconv.Unquote(path); err == nil {
+				path = unquoted
+			}
+		}
+
 		status := GitFileStatus{
 			Path:   path,
 			Status: strings.TrimSpace(xy),
@@ -1723,8 +1733,12 @@ func getPanesForSession(session string) ([]paneInfo, error) {
 			pane.AgentType = "gemini"
 		case strings.Contains(title, "cursor"):
 			pane.AgentType = "cursor"
+		case strings.Contains(title, "windsurf") || strings.Contains(title, "ws_"):
+			pane.AgentType = "windsurf"
 		case strings.Contains(title, "aider"):
 			pane.AgentType = "aider"
+		case strings.Contains(title, "ollama"):
+			pane.AgentType = "ollama"
 		default:
 			// Skip non-agent panes
 			continue

@@ -133,7 +133,7 @@ func (a *CASSAdapter) runCommand(ctx context.Context, args ...string) (json.RawM
 	defer cancel()
 
 	cmd := exec.CommandContext(ctx, a.BinaryName(), args...)
-	
+
 	// Limit output to 10MB
 	stdout := NewLimitedBuffer(10 * 1024 * 1024)
 	var stderr bytes.Buffer
